description: Story nodes that must be marked complete+revealed to mark the New Player Experience (tutorial) as completed. Same set the game sets when a player picks "Skip Tutorial" at character creation. Captured live from a completed character (Coastal) on 2026-07-04. Combined with the NPE.HasCompletedNPE tag, this unlocks Advanced_*_Fabricator patents and the rest of the tutorial-gated tech.
